identity.name: StakeChess
identity.emotional_tone: Intense focus, premium exclusivity, adrenaline of the wager

usage.hero_heading: font-heading font-black tracking-tight text-5xl md:text-7xl uppercase

grid_systems.marketing: Tetris Grid (Mode A) - Asymmetrical, artistic, overlapping
grid_systems.dashboard: Bento Grid (Mode B) - High density, data-rich, gap-4

buttons.primary: bg-[#D4AF37] text-black hover:bg-[#F4C430] font-bold uppercase tracking-widest px-8 py-4 rounded-sm transition-all duration-300 hover:shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(212,175,55,0.4)]
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-[#D4AF37]/30 text-[#D4AF37] hover:bg-[#D4AF37]/10 hover:border-[#D4AF37] uppercase tracking-widest px-8 py-4 rounded-sm

cards.base: bg-[#0A0A0A] border border-white/5 relative overflow-hidden group

inputs.classes: bg-[#121212] border-white/10 focus:border-[#D4AF37] text-white placeholder:text-white/20 rounded-sm h-12

navigation.classes: bg-black/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-white/5 sticky top-0 z-50

visual_enhancers.textures: Subtle noise overlay (opacity 0.03) on all dark backgrounds to prevent banding
effects: Tracing Beam borders for high-value cards

instructions_to_main_agent: INSTALL FONTS: Add 'Cinzel Decorative', 'Manrope', and 'JetBrains Mono' via Google Fonts in index.html immediately.
THEME ENFORCEMENT: Force DARK MODE. Do not create a light mode toggle. The brand is exclusively dark.
CHESS BOARD: Use 'chessboard.js' or 'react-chessboard' but heavily style it. The board squares should be Dark Charcoal (#1A1A1A) and Muted Gold (#4A4020). NOT black and white.
STAKING UI: The staking input should feel like a high-frequency trading terminal. Use monospace fonts for numbers.
WALLET: Simulate the wallet connection. When 'connected', show a balance in 'STAKE' tokens.
ADMIN PANEL: Use the 'Bento Grid' layout. High density. No wasted space.
NO ROUNDED CORNERS: Keep border-radius minimal (2px or 0px) for a sharp, aggressive, tactical feel.
DATA-TESTID: Every interactive element (buttons, inputs, chess squares) MUST have a data-testid attribute.
universal_guidelines: Avoid 'AI Slop': No generic centered layouts. Use asymmetry.
Micro-Animations: Buttons should scale down slightly on click. Links should have underline animations.
Toast Notifications: Use 'sonner' for all game alerts (Check, Checkmate, Wager Placed).
Accessibility: Ensure Gold text on Black background meets 4.5:1 contrast. Adjust gold brightness if needed.
